---
title: "Formatage_Donnees_Brutes"
output: html_document
date: "2026-05-28"
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = TRUE)
```

## Importation des librairies utiles :

```{r}

#library(tidyverse)
library(tidyr)
library(dplyr)
library(ggplot2)
library(purrr)
library(tibble)
library(stringr)
library(forcats)
library(lubridate)

```

## Importation des données brutes :
```{r}



```
